title: Wham Crystal 4x 80L Plastic Storage Boxes with Lids Tint Smoke (Black). Large Size, Strong (Pack of 4, 80 Litre). Made in the UK
features: MULTIPURPOSE STORAGE: Ideal for decluttering your home, office, or workspace, these Wham Crystal storage boxes provide an all-round convenient solution for organising toys, clothes, shoes & more.
AMPLE CAPACITY: This set includes 4 plastic storage boxes, each measuring W 29cm x L 48cm x H 40cm internally with a 80L capacity.
SPACE-SAVING DESIGN - These large size storage containers are stackable when in use with the lids clipped on to save floor space, and nestable when empty for compact storage.
SECURE CLIP-ON LIDS: These storage boxes feature a design with integrated handles that clip-on firmly, ensuring that your contents remain protected and safely stored away.
MADE IN THE UK: Proudly manufactured in Britain with premium quality, BPA-free polypropylene, these plastic boxes with lids are built to last, ensuring your storage needs are met long-term.
description: Product Description Find Your Favourite Colour Tint Spectrum Blue Our Crystal boxes with a Blue tint. Perfect for when your boxes are on show to help hide the contents whilst still making it really easy to see them when up close. Please note: The product size above is 32L (Underbed Storage) Tint Dusky Orchid Pink Our Crystal boxes with a Pink tint. They're guaranteed to look great in playrooms, home offices, bedrooms and anywhere else you like to keep your boxes. Please note: The product size above is 45L Tint Leprechaun Green Our Crystal boxes with a Green tint. Add a bit of flair to any room with our green tinted boxes. They look great in playrooms, offices, kitchen cupboards and much more. Please note: The product size above is 60L Tint Smoke Black Our Crystal boxes with a Black tint. Suitable for all situations, or mix and match them with colours to help organise your home and find items at a glance. Please note: The product size above is 28L Top Tip: Mix and Match Our tint boxes are available in a range of colours including; Dusky Orchid (Pink), Spectrum Blue, Leprechaun Green, Smoke (Black). You could stick to your favourite, or better yet use different colours for each of your storage needs. Maybe Pink for keepsakes, Blue for clothes, Green for decorations and Smoke (Black) for everything else. Or maybe Blue for cleaning supplies, Green for toiletries, Pink for makeup and Black for food. Whatever you decide, storage is easy and the options are endless with the Crystal Tint Range. Garage Storage Our hard wearing boxes are suitable for both garages and lofts and can handle both small and larger items. Bedding Storage Store your guest, spare, or seasonal bedding and other household items easily. Our clear boxes make it easy to see the contents. Toy Storage Conquer the chaos and finally get the playroom or nursery tidy (if only for a little while).
